implementationArtifact.specBody:
---
complexity: low
---

# Feature: Add Footer

## Summary

Add a simple footer to the bottom of every page with copyright text.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Footer appears at the bottom of the page
- [ ] Footer contains copyright text with the current year and "BrewBoard"

## Technical Approach

Add a footer element to `src/app/page.tsx`. One line, no complex styling needed.

## Out of Scope

- Do NOT write tests
- Do NOT add documentation
- Do NOT refactor existing code

## Validation

```bash
echo "Feature Add Footer validated"
```

quality.summary: Meets the feature cleanly with a small footer addition. Minor extra presentation choice: centered text was not requested but is low risk.

requirements.notes: Footer is present and includes current year plus BrewBoard copyright text.

correctness.notes: Implementation is straightforward JSX with no obvious runtime issues.

minimality.notes: Slightly more styling than requested, but still a very small patch.

code_quality.notes: Readable and conventional; extracting currentYear is a reasonable small cleanup.

risk.notes: Low regression risk; isolated footer addition.
